revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '<div class="pathnavbox"> * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の政治 (都道府県別)|宮城県の政治|宮城県の官公庁}} * {{Pathnav|主...'
revision.text:
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の政治 (都道府県別)|宮城県の政治|宮城県の官公庁}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の行政 (都道府県別)|宮城県の行政}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|行政機関|各国の行政機関|日本の行政機関|日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)}}
[[宮城県]]にある[[行政機関]]のカテゴリ。 [[Category:宮城県の官公庁|きようせいきかん]] [[Category:宮城県の行政|きようせいきかん]] [[Category:日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)|みやき]]

revision.comment: 体裁を調整。
revision.text:
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の政治 (都道府県別)|宮城県の政治|宮城県の官公庁}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の行政 (都道府県別)|宮城県の行政}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|行政機関|各国の行政機関|日本の行政機関|日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)}}
{{Template:Category:日本の都道府県/下位|宮城県|[[行政機関]]|行政機関|行政|きようせいきかん}} [[Category:宮城県の官公庁|きようせいきかん]] [[Category:日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)|みやきけん]]

revision.comment: [[Special:Diff/85363522#pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行|Bot作業依頼]]: [[MediaWiki‐ノート:Common.css#特定テンプレート用のCSSをTemplateStylesに移行する提案（8回目）|pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行]] (insource:/class=[" ]*pathnavbox/) - [[User:Cewbot/log/20190913|log]]
Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[ja:Category:宮城県の行政機関]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Sendai City Board of Education]].

revision.comment: Bot: log revisions ≥ 2025-05-13 with full text

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Merge [[Category:宮城県の官公庁]] into [[Category:Government Offices in Miyagi Prefecture]] via bot
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Merge [[Category:宮城県の行政]] into [[Category:Administration of Miyagi Prefecture]] via bot
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "Category:日本の都道府県" to "Category:Prefectures of Japan"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9626395)
Text replacement - "ategories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Cqq]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Cqq but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Pathnavbox|
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の政治 (都道府県別)|宮城県の政治|宮城県の官公庁}}
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の行政 (都道府県別)|宮城県の行政}}
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|行政機関|各国の行政機関|日本の行政機関|日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)}}
}}
{{Template:Category:Prefectures of Japan/下位|宮城県|[[行政機関]]|行政機関|行政|きようせいきかん}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:宮城県の行政機関|version=85406237}}
{{translated page|ja|宮城県の行政機関|2=Category:宮城県の行政機関|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
{{wikidata link|Q9626395}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[ja:Category:宮城県の行政機関]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Sendai City Board of Education]]
[[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
[[Category:Administration of Miyagi Prefecture]]
[[Category:Administrative Agencies of Japan by Prefecture]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Government Offices in Miyagi Prefecture]]
[[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Jawiki pages with translated titles]] (crud category cleanup)

* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の行政 (都道府県別)|宮城県の行政}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Administrative_Agencies_in_Miyagi_Prefecture here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Administrative_Agencies_in_Miyagi_Prefecture for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<!--templates-->
{{Pathnavbox|
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の政治 (都道府県別)|宮城県の政治|宮城県の官公庁}}
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の行政 (都道府県別)|宮城県の行政}}
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|行政機関|各国の行政機関|日本の行政機関|日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)}}
}}

<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Administrative_Agencies_in_Miyagi_Prefecture for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->

{{Pathnavbox|
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の政治 (都道府県別)|宮城県の政治|宮城県の官公庁}}
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|…|日本の行政 (都道府県別)|宮城県の行政}}
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|行政機関|各国の行政機関|日本の行政機関|日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)}}
}}
